description: Many environmental issues related to urbanization are derived from the manipulation of soil. By coupling contemporary literature in urban soils with soil science, students will be able to evaluate environmental issues within the urban environment and provide new ways of remediating their impact.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (PHYSICS 103,201,207, or247) and (SOIL SCI/​ENVIR ST/​GEOG  230orSOIL SCI 301or concurrent), or graduate/professional standing
